keywords.notes: DataForSEO shows pos 4, GSC avg 11.0 — discrepancy likely due to GSC averaging over 90 days vs live check. Position 4 is strong but GSC avg suggests fluctuation.
Not ranking in top 50. SERP dominated by international sites. No dedicated replacement page exists. Key gap.
Ranking but all traffic going to homepage, not a dedicated installation page. Dedicated /skylight-installation-melbourne/ page could strengthen this.

SERP dominated by velux.com.au official site and YouTube DIY videos. This query has DIY/instructional intent — difficult to compete. Consider targeting 'velux skylight installation melbourne' instead.
Position 5 live, 8.6 GSC avg. Strengthening /brand/velux/ page could push this into top 3.
SERP dominated by UK/international ecommerce sites (roof-maker.co.uk, rooflightcentre.co.uk). This query likely has global ecommerce intent — low value for Melbourne service business.
Position 9 — close to top 8. URL uses /tags/ taxonomy which is sub-optimal. Stronger content on this page could push to top 5.
Position 11 — just off page 1. Product page ranking, not a dedicated landing page.
SERP dominated by international sites. No Melbourne-specific content for this query exists. Creating a 'tiled roof skylight installation melbourne' page could help.
Similar to tiled roof — international SERP. A dedicated page targeting metal roof installation + Melbourne would be needed.
